## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

1.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Screenshots are welcome.

## Environment

- **Entra PIM Manager version**: (tray menu → About)
- **Windows version**: (e.g. Windows 11 23H2, build 22631)
- **Account type**: e.g. single Entra tenant / multi-tenant setup
- **Installed from**: official Velopack installer / build from source

## Logs

Relevant excerpts from `%LocalAppData%\Entra-PIM-Manager\logs\` if applicable.

**Please redact access tokens, refresh tokens, justification text, UPNs, and mail addresses before posting.**

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — recent changes, workarounds attempted, related issues.

For security-sensitive issues, please do **not** open a public issue — see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
